requirement_topic.en: NEC Article 706 — Energy Storage System Installation Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: NEC第706条——储能系统安装要求
requirement_topic.zht: NEC第706條——儲能系統安裝要求

summary.en: NFPA 70 (NEC) Article 706 governs the installation of stationary battery energy storage systems (BESS) in the US. Key requirements include: equipment must be listed to UL 9540 (Standard for Energy Storage Systems and Equipment); systems must be installed per manufacturer instructions and AHJ (Authority Having Jurisdiction) approval; battery management systems, ventilation, fire suppression provisions, and disconnecting means are mandated; interconnection to the grid must additionally comply with Article 705. Local AHJ inspection and permit are required before commissioning.
summary.zh: 美国《国家电气规范》(NEC) 第706条规范固定式电池储能系统（BESS）的安装。主要要求包括：设备须通过UL 9540（储能系统及设备标准）认证；系统须按制造商说明及地方主管当局（AHJ）批准安装；须配备电池管理系统、通风、消防措施及断路装置；并网接入须额外符合第705条规定。投入使用前须经地方AHJ检查并取得许可。
summary.zht: 美國《國家電氣規範》(NEC) 第706條規範固定式電池儲能系統（BESS）的安裝。主要要求包括：設備須通過UL 9540（儲能系統及設備標準）認證；系統須按製造商說明及地方主管當局（AHJ）批准安裝；須配備電池管理系統、通風、消防措施及斷路裝置；並網接入須額外符合第705條規定。投入使用前須經地方AHJ檢查並取得許可。

standards_or_laws: NFPA 70 (NEC) Article 706 — Energy Storage Systems (2023 edition)
NFPA 70 (NEC) Article 705 — Interconnection of Electric Power Production Sources
UL 9540 — Standard for Energy Storage Systems and Equipment
UL 9540A — Test Method for Evaluating Thermal Runaway Fire Propagation in Battery Energy Storage Systems

summary.en: [UNVERIFIED] China does not have a single national installation code directly equivalent to NEC Article 706. BESS installations in China are governed by a patchwork of standards including GB/T 36276 (lithium-ion battery cells for stationary energy storage), GB 51048 (code for design of electrochemical energy storage power station), and GB 50016 (fire protection design). There is no unified AHJ-style permitting process equivalent to the US model; compliance pathways involve product certification (CQC/CCC) and design-phase fire review by local fire authorities.
summary.zh: [UNVERIFIED] 中国目前没有与NEC第706条直接对应的统一安装规范。储能系统安装通常受以下标准约束：GB/T 36276（固定式储能用锂离子电池单体）、GB 51048（电化学储能电站设计规范）及GB 50016（建筑设计防火规范）。中国没有与美国AHJ许可制度对等的统一审批流程；合规路径包括产品认证（CQC/CCC）及设计阶段消防审查。
summary.zht: [UNVERIFIED] 中國目前沒有與NEC第706條直接對應的統一安裝規範。儲能系統安裝通常受以下標準約束：GB/T 36276（固定式儲能用鋰離子電池單體）、GB 51048（電化學儲能電站設計規範）及GB 50016（建築設計防火規範）。中國沒有與美國AHJ許可制度對等的統一審批流程；合規路徑包括產品認證（CQC/CCC）及設計階段消防審查。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36276-2023 — Lithium-ion cells and batteries used in energy storage [UNVERIFIED edition year]
GB 51048-2014 — Code for Design of Electrochemical Energy Storage Power Station [UNVERIFIED]
GB 50016-2014 (2018 revision) — Code for Fire Protection Design of Buildings [UNVERIFIED]

gap.en: Significant gap. The US requires installation per NEC 706/705 with listed equipment (UL 9540) and mandatory AHJ permit/inspection before commissioning — a unified, enforceable installation gate. China has no direct NEC 706 equivalent; multiple overlapping GB standards apply, but there is no single enforceable install code with equivalent scope. Chinese BESS products entering the US market must be listed to UL 9540 regardless of any Chinese certification held, and every installation site must pass AHJ inspection. This is a hard prerequisite — non-listed equipment cannot be legally installed in most US jurisdictions.
gap.zh: 差距显著。美国要求按NEC 706/705安装，设备须通过UL 9540认证，投入使用前须经AHJ许可及现场检查，构成统一、可强制执行的安装门槛。中国无对应的NEC 706安装规范，多项GB标准并行适用，但缺乏覆盖范围相当的单一强制安装规范。中国储能产品进入美国市场，无论持有何种中国认证，均须通过UL 9540认证，且每个安装场所须经AHJ检查。这是硬性前提条件——未获认证的设备在大多数美国司法管辖区不得合法安装。
gap.zht: 差距顯著。美國要求按NEC 706/705安裝，設備須通過UL 9540認證，投入使用前須經AHJ許可及現場檢查，構成統一、可強制執行的安裝門檻。中國無對應的NEC 706安裝規範，多項GB標準並行適用，但缺乏覆蓋範圍相當的單一強制安裝規範。中國儲能產品進入美國市場，無論持有何種中國認證，均須通過UL 9540認證，且每個安裝場所須經AHJ檢查。這是硬性前提條件——未獲認證的設備在大多數美國司法管轄區不得合法安裝。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — NEC is adopted by all 50 US states (with local amendments); AHJ permit and UL 9540 listing are legal prerequisites for installation
mandatory_status.cn: Partially mandatory — GB 51048 and GB 50016 apply to utility-scale projects; GB/T 36276 is a recommended standard with some mandatory procurement references [UNVERIFIED]

compliance_verdict.en: Informational only. Chinese-manufactured BESS destined for US installation must obtain UL 9540 listing and comply with NEC Article 706 (and Article 705 for grid-tied systems). Local AHJ permit and inspection are required at each installation site. No Chinese national certification substitutes for UL 9540 listing in the US. Consult a licensed US electrical engineer and the local AHJ for jurisdiction-specific requirements.
compliance_verdict.zh: 仅供参考。面向美国市场安装的中国制造储能系统须取得UL 9540认证，并符合NEC第706条（并网系统另须符合第705条）。每个安装场所须经地方AHJ审批及现场检查。中国国内认证不能替代UL 9540认证。请咨询持牌美国电气工程师及当地AHJ，了解具体司法管辖区的要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: 僅供參考。面向美國市場安裝的中國製造儲能系統須取得UL 9540認證，並符合NEC第706條（並網系統另須符合第705條）。每個安裝場所須經地方AHJ審批及現場檢查。中國國內認證不能替代UL 9540認證。請諮詢持牌美國電氣工程師及當地AHJ，了解具體司法管轄區的要求。
